1.q: the elevated AmWRKY14 transcription factor during winter activated AmTLP25 gene expression by specifically binding to its promoter.

2.q: Overexpression of the AmTLP25 gene led to an increased tolerance of transgenic Arabidopsis to freezing and osmotic stress.
